Category: Agriculture & Resources: Agriculture, Forestry, Fishing, Mining, Energy
Who is this for: Equipment operators, field workers, farm managers, mining technicians, drilling operators, maintenance personnel, safety supervisors, agricultural workers, forestry workers, energy sector technicians
Team or Dept this is for: Operations, Health & Safety, Field Operations, Equipment Maintenance, Agricultural Operations, Mining Operations, Energy Operations
Description: Risks of AI-assisted tractors, drilling systems, and autonomous equipment.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with either agricultural, forestry, mining, or energy sector operations is helpful, though no prior knowledge of artificial intelligence or advanced technology is required to follow this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks associated with AI-assisted tractors, autonomous drilling systems, and other heavy machinery used across agriculture, forestry, mining, and energy sectors. You will also be able to explain how to apply basic safety principles and risk management strategies to help protect yourself and your colleagues when working alongside AI-driven equipment.
